roundup.title: Google Drops Nano Banana 2 Lite & Gemini Omni Flash
roundup.subtitle: Google发布图像视频新模型，Mistral Leanstral 1.5登场
headline: @GoogleDeepMind 今日发布两款主力模型：Nano Banana 2 Lite 与 Gemini Omni Flash，前者主打高速低成本图像生成，后者专注视频生成与对话式编辑。@GoogleAIStudio 同步给出 API 接入细节，开发者可直接在 Gemini API 与 Google AI Studio 使用。
@vllm_project 祝贺 @MistralAI 发布 Leanstral 1.5，这是一款 Apache-2.0 的 Lean 4 证明 Agent，采用 119B 总参数 MoE 架构，活跃参数仅 6B，在 FATE-H 与 FATE-X 两个基准上取得 SOTA，同时 PutnamBench 得分 587/672。
@AnthropicAI 宣布 Claude Fable 5 明日全球重新开放，新增更严格的网络安全分类器；@cursor_ai 确认其已在 CursorBench 保持领先，但单任务成本最高。
@GoogleAIStudio 强调 Nano Banana 2 Lite 可在 4 秒内输出文本到图像，价格低至 $0.034 per 1K-resolution image，适合高吞吐开发者流水线。

deepDives.title: Google 发布 Nano Banana 2 Lite 与 Gemini Omni Flash
deepDives.summary: Google 推出两款新图像与视频生成模型，强调速度、成本与 API 可用性，面向开发者高吞吐场景。

facts.text: Nano Banana 2 Lite 是目前最快、最具性价比的 Gemini 图像模型。
facts.quote: nano banana 2 lite: our fastest, most cost-effective gemini image model yet

facts.text: Gemini Omni Flash 支持高质量视频生成与对话式编辑，已通过 Gemini API 开放。
facts.quote: gemini omni flash is here: our high-quality, cost-efficient model for video generation and conversational editing

bullish.text: 速度与成本大幅优化，适合高吞吐开发者流水线

deepDives.title: Mistral 发布 Leanstral 1.5 Lean 4 证明 Agent
deepDives.summary: Mistral 推出 Apache-2.0 的 Lean 4 证明 Agent，在多个数学证明基准取得 SOTA。

facts.text: Leanstral 1.5 采用 MoE 架构，总参数 119B，活跃参数 6B。
facts.quote: MoE 119B total, 6B active, new SOTA on FATE-H (87%) & FATE-X (34%), 587/672 on PutnamBench

bullish.text: An Apache-2.0 Lean 4 proof agent that punches way above its size

bullets.text: @OpenRouter 使用 MCP 将 Agent 推理成本降低 24 倍且质量相当
bullets.quote: Saving 24x on inference costs with comparable quality, using the OpenRouter MCP

bullets.text: @LangChain 发布 OpenWiki 开源 harness，可提升 coding agent 性能
@HuggingPapers 推出 Video-MME-Logical 视频逻辑推理基准，模型最高仅 28.6%
bullets.quote: Humans score 95.9%. The best model manages just 28.6%.

bullets.text: @ScaleAILabs 发布 SWE-Bench Pro 与 VeRO 两个新 Agent 评估框架
@ollama 使 Gemma 4 在 Apple Silicon 上推理速度提升近 90%
bullets.quote: Gemma 4 is now nearly 90% faster on Apple Silicon with Ollama using MLX!

topTweets.author: @GoogleAIStudio
topTweets.text: Nano Banana 2 Lite 4 秒生成，价格 $0.034/千分辨率
topTweets.whyItMatters: 提供具体速度与价格，开发者可直接评估

topTweets.author: @vllm_project
topTweets.text: Mistral Leanstral 1.5 取得多项证明基准 SOTA
topTweets.whyItMatters: 小参数 MoE 在数学证明任务领先

topTweets.author: @OpenRouter
topTweets.text: MCP 让 Agent 推理成本降低 24 倍

takeaways: Google 新图像模型 4 秒生成 + 极低价格，适合高吞吐流水线集成。
Mistral Leanstral 1.5 以 6B 活跃参数在数学证明基准取得 SOTA，可用 vLLM 直接部署。
MCP 与 OpenWiki 等开源 harness 正在成为 Agent 成本与性能优化的标准工具。

items.author: @vllm_project
items.text: Congrats to @MistralAI on Leanstral 1.5! An Apache-2.0 Lean 4 proof agent that punches way above its size: MoE 119B total, 6B active, new SOTA on FATE-H (87%) & FATE-X (34%), 587/672 on PutnamBench.
items.whyItMatters: Lean 证明 agent SOTA，可用 vLLM 部署

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: 🐟️ Sakana Translate公開 🐟️ 本日、Sakana AIはチャットサービス「Sakana Chat」に新機能「Sakana Translate」を追加しました。日本語・英語・中国語の双方向翻訳に対応します。
items.whyItMatters: Sakana新翻译产品发布，支持日英中，带Namazu模型基准

items.author: @ThePrimeagen
items.text: an LLM playing my game... I wonder how far I can take this...
items.whyItMatters: LLM实时玩游戏原型，展示Agent交互潜力

items.author: @omarsar0
items.text: Great overview of always-on agents. It's a new 130+ pages survey on always-on agents. Paper: https://t.co/FRvZ7YGpaN
items.whyItMatters: 130+页 always-on agents 综述，含 state 管理框架

items.author: @kimmonismus
items.text: New exclusive interview: Microsoft Research's Ahmed Awadallah on Fara1.5, MagenticBrain, and the case for small, on-device agents that go toe to toe with the giants. A 9B computer-use model that nearly doubles its predecessor on web navigation.
items.whyItMatters: 小模型 on-device agent 接近大模型性能细节

items.author: @HuggingPapers
items.text: Video-MME-Logical exposes a massive reasoning gap in video MLLMs. A new controlled benchmark for temporal-logical reasoning in video. Humans score 95.9%. The best model manages just 28.6%.
items.whyItMatters: 视频MLLM逻辑推理新基准，人类95.9% vs 模型28.6%

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text: Saving 24x on inference costs with comparable quality, using the OpenRouter MCP
items.whyItMatters: MCP让Agent选模型，推理成本降24倍

items.author: @emollick
items.text: Less than 2 years later, with Fable: "simulate an encounter between a mind flayer and a drow warrior of equal CR. Set up initial stats then simulate each move, including initiative, rolling dice as needed, starting from 60 ft apart. Show me the results in a 3D simulation"
items.whyItMatters: 展示新模型Fable在复杂模拟任务上的显著进步

items.author: @ostrisai
items.text: Training Wan 2.1-1.3B to use Qwen3-VL-2B text encoder... It is amazing how quickly a model can adapt to a different text encoder.
items.whyItMatters: 展示模型快速适配新text encoder的训练实验

items.author: @tszzl
items.text: software only intelligence explosion is possible and very likely. algorithmic progress vastly outstrips humanity’s compute buildout, and is self accelerating
items.whyItMatters: 讨论纯软件 RSI 可能性，对 AI  scaling 路径有启发

items.author: @willccbb
items.text: there will soon come a time, perhaps next year, when voice interaction + multimodal reasoning models are good enough and fast enough that you can actually just program like this
items.whyItMatters: 预测语音+多模态将改变编程交互方式

items.author: @dzhng
items.text: Fed this article to Fable and we created an explore-unknowns skill. It scans your codebase, then interviews you one question at a time to close the known unknowns. Then sweeps for the unknown unknowns you never thought of. Now part of my software factory: https://github.com/dzhng/skills
items.whyItMatters: 开源Agent技能实现未知探索，结合Fable/Codex构建复杂项目。

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: Claude Fable 5 will be available again globally tomorrow. After a series of productive conversations with the US government, we're redeploying the model with a new set of classifiers to target and block more cybersecurity tasks.
items.whyItMatters: Fable 5 回归细节与安全更新，影响 coding/agent 使用

items.author: @runwayml
items.text: Introducing Agent Skills. Build an ad campaign, create a commercial, localize your ads and more with a simple command. Type /, choose a Skill and Agent gets to work. Scale your marketing. On command.
items.whyItMatters: Runway推出Agent Skills，支持命令式营销自动化

items.author: @jeffboudier
items.text: Frontier-level AI you can actually host yourself, in a few commands, on a single node of AMD GPUs. ... deploy @Zai_org GLM 5.2 on AMD Instinct MI300X ... saving 50% on your compute bill
items.whyItMatters: 开源前沿模型单节点AMD部署，成本减半，企业可控

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: We are licensing Laguna XS 2.1 under OpenMDW-1.1. We are making this change to support open model distribution for the community. OpenMDW-1.1 is fully permissive...
items.whyItMatters: 新版 agentic coding 模型开源许可更新，支持多推理框架

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: XS 2.1 is supported in vLLM, SGLang, TensorRT-LLM, Hugging Face Transformers, and @ollama, with BF16, FP8, INT4, and NVFP4 checkpoints available.
items.whyItMatters: 模型多框架部署支持，加速本地/生产推理

items.author: @LangChain
items.text: OpenWiki is the easiest way to increase your coding agent performance, and it's fully OSS: open harness (deepagents), open CLI/workflows, runs on open models (GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, etc)
items.whyItMatters: 开源工具自动更新 docs，提升 coding agent 表现

items.author: @togethercompute
items.text: We're releasing the full slides for our 2 hr deepdive session from the AI Engineer World's Fair. We covered how we build inference engines to serve agentic workloads at trillion token production scale.
items.whyItMatters: 万亿token规模Agentic推理引擎深度slides公开

items.author: @fal
items.text: learn how to combine the power of Claude Fable 5 and fal Workflows to design GenMedia pipelines that maintain brand guidelines at scale 📈 full tutorial in replies
items.whyItMatters: Claude Fable 5 + fal 工作流教程，品牌一致性 GenMedia 管道

items.author: @lvwerra
items.text: Can agents collaborate to gather *all* information on a research topic and write it up it in a useful deep research wiki... they processed 200+ papers... wrote 45 articles with 75k words / 250 pages...
items.whyItMatters: Hugging Face展示多Agent协作构建深度研究Wiki

items.author: @jonasgeiping
items.text: If you're interested in more details, please check out the paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30571 ... All of this comes out to 40 pages of hard work...
items.whyItMatters: 新论文分析模型间对话导致的latent space行为变化

items.author: @RedHat_AI
items.text: NASA's Johnson Space Center is testing RamaLama to power a medical AI assistant for deep space missions... No cloud. No connection. Just open source AI at the edge.
items.whyItMatters: 开源AI在NASA深空任务中的边缘部署案例

items.author: @julien_c
items.text: True
items.whyItMatters: Hugging Face CTO认可Qwen 27B为近期最佳开源模型

items.author: @johnschulman2
items.text: People sometimes ask why fine-tune when general-purpose models keep getting better. Bridgewater's work is a good reminder that with the right data -- here, expert judgements -- you can beat prompting-only approaches by a lot. @ddkang and the Bridgewater AIA Labs team are great -- glad to see them sharing this.
items.whyItMatters: 展示专家数据微调显著优于提示工程的实际案例

items.author: @maximelabonne
items.text: DeepSeek effect https://t.co/qt0sRctv0i
items.whyItMatters: 开源数据集被 DeepSeek 用于训练新模型

items.author: @maximelabonne
items.text: IFStruct now has a leaderboard on @huggingface! 🎉
items.whyItMatters: 结构化输出指令遵循新 benchmark 上线 HF

items.author: @cursor_ai
items.text: Claude Fable 5 is available again in Cursor. It leads all models on CursorBench, but is the most expensive per task.
items.whyItMatters: Fable 5 在 CursorBench 领先，coding agent 性能参考

items.author: @claudeai
items.text: Claude Fable 5 is now available in Claude Tag. Announcing Built with Claude: Life Sciences, a global virtual hackathon. Join us and @GladstoneInst for a week of researching and building with Claude Science and Claude Code, with a prize pool of $100k in credits.
items.whyItMatters: Fable 5新版本上线+生命科学黑客松，$100k credits激励AI应用开发。

items.author: @ClaudeDevs
items.text: Advancement through rate limit tiers is automatic. To manually request a higher rate limit, click "Request rate limit increase" in the Claude Console.
items.whyItMatters: Claude API速率限制自动升级与手动申请更新

items.author: @ID_AA_Carmack
items.text: GPU utilization is a measure of the time the GPU is not completely idle, it will not go down because of thermal or power throttling. If less than 100%, the GPU is going idle waiting for the CPU to give it more work.
items.whyItMatters: Carmack 详解 GPU 利用率本质与优化误区

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: ICML 2026 is almost here, and we're headed to Seoul with 7 accepted papers. 🇰🇷 Our research spans agent training, scientific reasoning, and evaluations advancing the next generation of AI systems. Here's an early look at the work we'll be presenting 🧵
items.whyItMatters: Scale 7篇ICML论文，覆盖Agent训练与评估基准

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: SWE-Bench Pro: Can AI Agents Solve Long-Horizon Software Engineering Tasks? https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.16941
items.whyItMatters: 新SWE-Bench Pro基准，测试长时程软件工程Agent

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: VeRO: An Evaluation Harness for Agents to Optimize Agents https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.22480
items.whyItMatters: Agent优化Agent的评估框架，实用基准工具

items.author: @ValsAI
items.text: Today, we're launching Vals Public Sector: independent AI evaluation for government. ... We've spent years building industry-leading benchmarks alongside the top AI labs...
items.whyItMatters: 推出政府AI独立评估服务，含前沿模型基准

items.author: @ollama
items.text: Gemma 4 is now nearly 90% faster on Apple Silicon with Ollama using MLX! The speedup comes from improved multi-token prediction (MTP), now on by default for Gemma 4, with more models to come.
items.whyItMatters: 本地模型推理大幅加速，MLX+MTP优化对Apple Silicon开发者意义重大。

items.author: @GeminiApp
items.text:
New ways you can use Gemini Spark to make your life easier.

From integration in the Gemini app for macOS to smart triggers, here are five ways we’re making Gemini Spark an even more powerful personal AI agent
items.whyItMatters: Gemini Spark Beta上线，macOS集成+智能触发器

items.author: @DrJimFan
items.text: ENPIRE -> ASPIRE, our 2nd work in the series for Physical AutoResearch. We are building the components for robot self-improvement, one /skill at a time.
items.whyItMatters: 机器人技能库自进化，实现持续学习与跨 embodiment 迁移

items.author: @GoogleAI
items.text: As generative AI tools continue to evolve, we believe it's more important than ever to know what's AI-generated and what isn't. That’s why @GoogleDeepMind launched SynthID in 2023—a technology that adds a hidden digital watermark to AI content. Here’s a summary of SynthID’s journey and where the provenance technology i
items.whyItMatters: SynthID 水印技术扩展至多模态并开源，AI 内容溯源实用进展

items.author: @Cloudflare
items.text: One year after declaring Content Independence Day, a dynamic market for monetized content has emerged. In this report, we examine how the rise of autonomous AI agents is upending traditional search referrals and detail the new infrastructure required to support a sustainable web economy.
items.whyItMatters: AI 代理颠覆搜索引流，云flare 报告分析新内容经济基础设施

items.author: @googledevs
items.text: Your Enterprise Notebooks just got an upgrade. You can now use Google Cloud Workbench Instances directly from your favorite IDE with the new VS Code extension. With this new extension you can connect to and run notebooks on managed cloud environments directly within your local IDE. As part of our commitment to the deve
items.whyItMatters: VS Code 扩展直连 Google Cloud Workbench，开源企业 notebook 工作流

items.author: @wandb
items.text: Introducing CoreWeave ARIA, the first AI research agent that runs autoresearch in your W&B dashboard. It reads your runs, finds what's working, and launches the next experiment itself.
items.whyItMatters: W&B 推出 autoresearch agent，演示 nanochat 自动实验

items.author: @OpenAI
items.text: We’re introducing GeneBench-Pro, a research-level benchmark for a harder kind of AI progress: how well agents can navigate messy biological data, choose the right analysis path, and make judgment calls that real computational research depends on.
items.whyItMatters: 新 agent benchmark，专注生物数据真实研究任务

items.author: @GoogleDeepMind
items.text: We’re shipping 2 major releases: 🔘 Nano Banana 2 Lite: our fastest and cheapest Gemini Image model 🔘 Gemini Omni Flash: now available via the Gemini API and in @GoogleAIStudio to help developers generate and edit high-quality videos.
items.whyItMatters: 新图像与视频模型发布，API可用，显著提升生成速度与成本效率。

items.author: @perplexity_ai
items.text: Claude Sonnet 5 is now available in Perplexity for Pro and Max subscribers. You can also select it as an orchestrator model in Computer.
items.whyItMatters: Perplexity集成Claude Sonnet 5，提升搜索与Agent编排能力。

items.author: @karpathy
items.text: Congrats!! I was impressed to learn about some of the engineering wizardry (e.g. *very* low voltage domains, cluster scale memory, ...) that goes into tokens/watt maxxing of state of the art LLMs at interactive tokens/sec/user.
items.whyItMatters: 深度解析LLM推理能效工程，对大规模部署优化有参考价值。

items.author: @GoogleResearch
items.text: Introducing TabFM, a foundation model designed specifically for tabular data classification & regression. This approach allows generation of high-quality predictions on previously unseen tables in a single forward pass.
items.whyItMatters: Tabular数据零样本基础模型发布，单次前向预测

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text:
introducing nano banana 2 lite: our fastest, most cost-effective gemini image model yet

built for high-velocity developer pipelines, it delivers text-to-image outputs in 4 seconds at just $0.034 per 1K-resolution image
items.whyItMatters: 新图像模型，4秒生成，价格低至$0.034/千分辨率

items.author: @GoogleAIStudio
items.text: gemini omni flash is here: our high-quality, cost-efficient model for video generation and conversational editing
items.whyItMatters: 新多模态视频生成模型，支持自然语言编辑

items.author: @AndrewYNg
items.text: “Loop engineering” is a hot buzzphrase after mentions of it by Boris Cherny (Claude Code’s creator) and Peter Steinberger (OpenClaw's creator) went viral on social media. Loops are now a key part of how we get AI agents to iterate at length to build software. In this letter, I’d like to share my 3 key loops, shown in t
items.whyItMatters: 详解AI coding agents的三种核心循环，提升产品构建效率

items.author: @GoogleAI
items.text: We’re shipping two major updates to streamline your creative workflow, allowing you to generate high-speed images with one model and then instantly animate them with the other—all at a fraction of the cost 🍌⚡️ 1️⃣ Introducing Nano Banana 2 Lite: Our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini Image model yet delivers text-
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 新图像/视频模型发布，速度与成本大幅优化

items.author: @turbopuffer
items.text: Legora searches 2B+ legal documents on turbopuffer → strict per-matter data isolation with CMEK → 10x lower tail latency than Postgres → 98% avg recall@10
items.whyItMatters: 展示 vector DB 在真实 AI 产品中的低延迟高召回表现

items.author: @XiaomiMiMo
items.text: Open-weights are taking over — proud to see more developers building on MiMo. 👏 @cline
items.whyItMatters: MiMo 开放权重被 Cline 等 coding agent 集成采用

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: We’re launching Nano Banana 2 Lite, our fastest most cost-efficient Gemini Image model yet, optimized for high-throughput developer pipelines. Alongside it, Gemini Omni Flash, our video generation and editing model is now available to developers. Both models are accessible today via @GoogleAIStudio and the Gemini API t
items.whyItMatters: 新图像/视频模型发布，含速度、成本、API细节，开发者可直接集成。

items.author: @felixrieseberg
items.text: Maybe 2026 is finally the year of the Linux Desktop! We're launching the Claude desktop app for Linux, including Claude Code, Claude Cowork, and chat. https://claude.com/download
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code等工具正式支持Linux桌面，提升开发者跨平台体验。

items.author: @LightOnIO
items.text: One API. Three endpoints. Every block a SOTA model. LightOn Console is document intelligence you can build on. Parse, search, and reason over your documents through one API... On OCR and retrieval benchmarks, LightOn models go head to head with the world's largest AI labs
items.whyItMatters: 主权部署RAG/Agent平台，SOTA基准+可审计引用

items.author: @JayAlammar
items.text: This year, the local model is becoming critical infrastructure at every scale... @rasbt's new writeup walks through setting this up locally, with a nod to @cohere's North Mini Code (Nomico), open under Apache 2.0.
items.whyItMatters: 本地编码Agent与开源小模型部署指南

items.author: @AIatMeta
items.text: We’re sharing the next major milestone in our non-invasive brain-to-text decoder research: Brain2Qwerty v2. Building on v1, which was published today in @Nature, Brain2Qwerty v2 is the highest-performing end-to-end pipeline capable of real-time sentence decoding from raw brain signals. ... The results are promising: -
items.whyItMatters: Meta 发布脑信号实时解码 v2，准确率显著提升并开源代码
